name: PasswordPusher
description: Share passwords, text, files, URLs, and QR payloads via secret links that expire by views and/or time. Encrypted storage, optional passphrase, audit logging, and JSON API.

BUNDLE_WITHOUT.description: Bundler groups to exclude from production bundle.

RAILS_LOG_TO_STDOUT.description: Log to stdout for Heroku log drain.

RAILS_SERVE_STATIC_FILES.description: Serve static assets from Rails when no CDN is in front.

SECRET_KEY_BASE.description: Rails secret key base. Generate: rails secret

PWPUSH_MASTER_KEY.description: Lockbox encryption key for payloads. Generate: rails runner 'puts Lockbox.generate_key'

WEB_CONCURRENCY.description: Puma worker processes (memory vs throughput tradeoff).

PWP__HOST_DOMAIN.description: Public hostname without scheme (e.g. myapp.herokuapp.com). Required for correct secret URLs.

PWP__OVERRIDE_BASE_URL.description: Full base URL if app is behind a proxy or custom domain (e.g. https://secrets.example.com).

PWP__ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: Space-separated hostnames Rails should accept (Host header). Set to your Heroku hostname and custom domains.

PWP__FILES__STORAGE.description: File push backend: local (ephemeral on Heroku) or s3. Use s3 for durable file pushes; see docs for PWP__FILES__S3__* vars.

PWP__ALLOW_ANONYMOUS.description: Allow creating pushes without signing in.

PWP__DISABLE_SIGNUPS.description: Hide Sign Up and block new registrations via UI.

PWP__DISABLE_LOGINS.description: Hide Log In; sign_in returns 404. Use with allow_anonymous true for anonymous-only. Do not combine with allow_anonymous false.

PWP__ENABLE_USER_ACCOUNT_EMAILS.description: Devise mail (confirm/reset). Requires SMTP; set PWP__MAIL__SMTP_* when true.

PWP__MAIL__SMTP_ADDRESS.description: SMTP host when account emails are enabled.

PWP__ENABLE_FILE_PUSHES.description: File pushes require a signed-in user unless disable_logins hides the feature.
